creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sergey Kozlov from comment #4)
Great work Sergey.  Considering that Kibana can point to a URL on a remote Elasticsearch I don't consider the textproc/elasticsearch2 to be a hard dependency, particularly since we don't have Elasticsearch 2.1.x in ports yet to actually use textproc/kibana43.  Given that, I committed both ports with very tiny changes from the version in the review.

Unfortunately, I didn't get to test it myself just yet.  It looks like textproc/elasticsearch2 won't start on my home ELK setup in a jail because it doesn't have a loopback and I haven't tried VIMAGE yet.  I'm on vacation and won't be able to update my ELK machine at work until I return.  So I'll count on run time testing you mentioned the review.

Thanks again!
